completed_prs.title: Issue severity dedupe mute SLA contract

governance_results.architecture_contract: Observation Queue is observation only and not URL Truth, Search Channel Queue, CMS writer, raw crawler log reader, or auto-fix engine.
governance_results.observation_queue_schema_contract: Future seo_observation_queue shape is defined without a real migration or writer.
governance_results.issue_severity_contract: P0/P1/P2/P3, deterministic dedupe, mute, owner, SLA, reopen, occurrence, and closeout rules are defined without issue mutation.
governance_results.entity_key_contract: translation_group_uuid is the future stable key; translation_group_id is transitional; legacy content without key is legacy_unpaired.
governance_results.ops_seo_display_readiness: Future /ops/seo panels are read-only and explicitly exclude write controls, raw data, and Metabase exposure.

validation_summary.focused_contract_tests: passed for PR1 through PR5 and closeout
validation_summary.seo_intel_suite: passed during each PR before merge
validation_summary.route_list: passed during each PR before merge
validation_summary.pint: passed during each PR before merge
